case_title: HICKY THOMAS PAUL VS FERRY PLAZA MAILBOXES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FERRY PLAZA MAILBOXES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10.00 FILED BY HICKY THOMAS PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT FERRY PLAZA MAILBOXES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HICKY THOMAS PAUL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FERRY PLAZA MAILBOXES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
